title: 日本ダービーの後に・傲岸な勝者

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O crosses the finish line! She's
victorious against her sworn rival, Admire Vega!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! What a grand performance! That
race will live on in the annals of Derby history till
the end of time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
All will know that I was able to surpass Ayabe
running at her full strength!
choice_data_list: Yeah, you both did so well!
Yeah, you both did so well!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back on it, the Satsuki Sho had most
likely been received rather like a one-man play.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But that wasn't the case today! Ayabe lived up to
her proud role as my rival, cranking the gears of
the revolving stage herself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Good show, Ayabe! You have my gratitude!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Honestly... I hate that I lost, but...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I ran exactly as I wanted to. It was because you
told me to face the troubles within myself after
the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Now I know... I can handle the burden. I can face
my destiny.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Just so! I understand completely!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How about it, Ayabe? In the very beginning, you
were reticent about playing the part of my rival.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that you've lived it, are you not filled with
satisfaction from the residuals of my spotlight?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I guess... in a way, you might be right.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But of course I am! I knew from the very
beginning! 500 years before we even met.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O is amazing...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ayabe really hated her... But now she's laughing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But listen well! The opening bars have only just
been sung.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With the first act of our classic year coming to a
close this spring, the main show is now set to
start!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For what lies ahead of us are the senior year
races.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, Ayabe? With experience playing my rival
under your belt, would you join my side to take
on the generation of yore?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes! Our sights will be set...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
On the Arima Kinen at this year's end! Will you
not join me in ringing the bell to start this
generational change?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Derby just ended, but T.M. Opera O is
already fired up for the next race.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll... pass.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How could this be? It's unlike you to be reluctant.
You must tell me why!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I have two... One, that I'm not good enough to
beat them yet.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And the other...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Keeping up with your antics is... exhausting. I
can't take it around the clock like this.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A-Ayabe?! Do not give up so easily! You will
adapt, and soon enough this will all be second
nature!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come back, Ayabe! Fly into my bosom! Embrace
me wholeheartedly! ...Heeey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's face turns bright red, and she
books it straight out of here. It must've been too
awkward for her to handle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm, shyness on that scale could be an issue.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Such are her ways. She will surely come around in
time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, after winning against Admire Vega, T.M.
Opera O charges toward the Arima Kinen with
boosted confidence.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Nghhh... Opera O's rival...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Back then, if I had just done something...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My worthy adversary is you, Doto, the surprise
villain! Take my hand and rise onto the stage!
Come, come!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: If I had taken her hand then, by now, I would be...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Urghh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I wish I were stronger... So maybe someday...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I could impress even Opera O!
